test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: health_check_with_unsupported_method_returns_405
test_cases.description: Verifies that using an unsupported HTTP method on the health endpoint returns 405.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with missing required fields returns 422.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_name_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with a name exceeding max length returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with default pagination works.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_custom_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with custom skip and limit works.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing author works.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_returns_304
test_cases.description: Verifies that using If-None-Match with a matching ETag returns 304.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with valid data works.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_mismatch_returns_412
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with a mismatched ETag returns 412.

test_cases.name: delete_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an existing author works.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with an invalid ISBN length returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with default pagination works.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_filter
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with a search filter works.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range_filter
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with a price range filter works.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing book works.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a book with valid data works.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that soft-deleting an existing book works.

test_cases.name: delete_already_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a soft-deleted book works.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_valid_discount_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a valid discount to a book works.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit_returns_429
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for discounts returns 429.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that bulk creating books with valid data works.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_exceeding_rate_limit_returns_429
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for bulk creation returns 429.
